title: Implement #1370 contract-owned conformance cases

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement #1370 contract-owned conformance cases across command-generation and Agentic Workspace.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep behavior examples contract-owned, keep target differences in thin adapters, avoid AW-specific generic runner logic, and prove generated Python/TypeScript targets.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Use the smallest cross-repo implementation that moves reusable conformance projection/runner logic into command-generation while preserving AW product-specific contract ownership.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Completed; close the planning item after proof.
proof_expectations: AW generated Python and TypeScript conformance proof
AW contract tooling, structured inventory, maintainer surfaces, schema reference docs, test-workspace, and lint-workspace
touched_scope: AW generated command package checker and proof-runner tests
AW maintainer playbook and command-generation dependency pin
completion_criteria: Shared command-generation conformance case runner exists and is tested.
AW generated Python and TypeScript adapter conformance consume the shared runner.
Maintainer guidance routes command behavior examples to conformance contracts before one-off tests.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
closure_check.why this decision is honest: The lane added the shared runner in command-generation, removed AW's duplicate projection/assertion logic, proved Python and TypeScript generated adapter conformance, and documented the future testing strategy.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Companion command-generation PR #8; AW generated-package proof and workspace proof commands passed.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen if generated Python or TypeScript adapter conformance stops consuming contract-owned cases through command-generation, or if the companion command-generation PR cannot merge.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, report AW smoothness/helpfulness gaps, better-way signals, unused-feature reflections, and places AW could help more. Route each concrete signal to exactly one owner class unless explicitly split, or mark no_signal_found after checking.
